race.comment: KEEP ON RUNNING (1) has hit a purple patch of form with three wins and two seconds from his past five starts and is racing with a lot of confidence of late. Winning rider Cormack stays on top and should be right there when the judge calls a halt. MARCH MADNESS (10) got a well-deserved win around this circuit last time out and the extra furlong here should suit. Serious top-three contender. KOBAYASTAR (5) is a four-time winner here who gets 1.5kg off with the claim and jumps from a low draw. Ticks a few boxes for a race like this. PROMINENT LAD (2) is having his first run for the new stable but should find this easier than recent metro efforts. Include in calculations. UNIFIES (6) will be rock-hard fit for this and may earn a cheque with luck in running.
